name: Antigen Processing and MHC Presentation
description: Antigen presentation: endogenous proteins are processed by the proteasome and loaded onto MHC class I for CD8+ T cells, while exogenous antigens are degraded in endosomes and loaded onto MHC class II for CD4+ T cells.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Antigen in/at the cell"]
    N2{"Endogenous or exogenous?"}
    N3["Proteasome cleaves cytosolic Ag"]
    N4["TAP transports peptides to ER"]
    N5["Peptide loads MHC class I"]
    N6["MHC I surface: CD8+ T cell"]
    N7["Endocytosis to phagolysosome"]
    N8["Proteolysis in MIIC"]
    N9["HLA-DM removes CLIP"]
    N10["Peptide loads MHC class II"]
    N11["MHC II surface: CD4+ T cell"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 -->|endogenous| N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N2 -->|exogenous| N7
    N7 --> N8
    N8 --> N9
    N9 --> N10
    N10 --> N11

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff

nodeDetails.label: Endogenous or exogenous?
nodeDetails.detail: Source of the antigen routes the pathway

nodeDetails.label: TAP transports peptides to ER
nodeDetails.detail: TAP imports peptides into the ER

nodeDetails.label: MHC I surface: CD8+ T cell
nodeDetails.detail: MHC I displays peptide to cytotoxic CD8+ T cells

nodeDetails.label: Proteolysis in MIIC
nodeDetails.detail: Cathepsins degrade antigen in the MHC II compartment

nodeDetails.label: HLA-DM removes CLIP
nodeDetails.detail: HLA-DM exchanges CLIP for antigenic peptide

nodeDetails.label: Peptide loads MHC class II
nodeDetails.detail: Antigenic peptide loaded onto MHC II

nodeDetails.label: MHC II surface: CD4+ T cell
nodeDetails.detail: MHC II displays peptide to helper CD4+ T cells

flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.
